zh: 辩证唯物主义（物质与意识）
def_zh: 哲学基本问题是思维和存在的关系问题（何者为本原——唯物/唯心；有无同一性——可知论/不可知论）。辩证唯物主义：世界的本质是物质（物质决定意识，意识是客观存在的反映、对物质具有能动的反作用）；运动是物质的固有属性，规律是客观的（不以人的意志为转移——尊重规律与发挥主观能动性相结合，一切从实际出发、实事求是）。实践是认识的基础（来源、动力、检验标准、目的），认识经实践—认识—再实践循环上升——“实践是检验真理的唯一标准”。
def_en: The official philosophy's foundations, taught as a system: philosophy's basic question (thinking v. being — materialism against idealism, knowability against agnosticism); matter as primary with consciousness its active reflection; law-governed motion independent of will ('proceed from reality, seek truth from facts'); and practice as knowledge's source, engine, test and purpose — the epistemology whose one-line version, 'practice is the sole criterion of truth', relaunched China in 1978. Marxist philosophical English (base, superstructure, negation) remains live currency in western theory too — this node is the shared dictionary.

sources.chapter: 第二课 探究世界的本质

collocations: practice as the criterion of truth
example: Deng's reformers won the 1978 argument by quoting this chapter's epistemology against its own orthodoxy — 'practice as the sole criterion' was philosophy deployed as regime change, the textbook's most consequential sentence.
nuance: 唯物/唯心主义 = materialism/idealism（哲学义，与日常英语 materialistic 拜金、idealistic 理想化的落差——高频误读警告）。主观能动性 = subjective initiative/agency。实事求是链 [[third-plenum]]。“物质”哲学义 = matter（非 material 财物）。

zh: 唯物辩证法（联系、发展、矛盾）
def_zh: 唯物辩证法的总特征：联系的观点（普遍性、客观性、多样性——用联系的观点看问题、掌握系统优化方法）与发展的观点（前进性与曲折性统一——前途光明道路曲折；量变与质变——量的积累到一定程度引起质变，“不积跬步无以至千里”）。实质与核心：矛盾规律（对立统一）——矛盾的普遍性与特殊性（具体问题具体分析）、主要矛盾与次要矛盾、矛盾的主要方面与次要方面（“两点论与重点论统一”）。辩证否定观：扬弃——不是简单肯定或否定一切。
def_en: The method behind the slogans: everything connected (hence 'systems thinking' as official method), everything developing ('the future is bright, the road is tortuous' — progress through spirals), quantity turning into quality at thresholds. Its 'living soul' is contradiction analysis: contradictions universal yet each particular ('concrete analysis of concrete conditions'), ranked into principal and secondary with principal aspects — the analytical grid by which the party names each era's 主要矛盾 and thereby its policy priority. Dialectical negation ('sublation' — keep the kernel, shed the husk) rounds out a toolkit that explains why Chinese official prose reasons the way it does.

sources.chapter: 第三课 把握世界的规律

example: When the 19th Congress re-named the 'principal contradiction' for the first time since 1981, economists worldwide had to learn this chapter overnight — a philosophy lesson that repriced policy expectations.
nuance: 矛盾 = contradiction（黑格尔—马克思术语；毛《矛盾论》On Contradiction 使其成为中国政治思维的元语法）；扬弃 = sublation（Aufheben——哲学英语硬词）。量变质变 = quantitative/qualitative change。“具体问题具体分析”= concrete analysis of concrete conditions（列宁语）。链 [[laozi]] 对立转化（福祸相依）——中式辩证的本土根系。

zh: 历史唯物主义（社会存在与人民群众）
en: historical materialism: social being and the people
def_zh: 社会存在决定社会意识，社会意识具有相对独立性（先进社会意识可推动社会发展）。生产力与生产关系、经济基础与上层建筑的矛盾运动是社会发展的基本规律（生产关系一定要适合生产力状况——改革即社会主义制度的自我完善和发展）。社会历史的主体是人民群众：人民群众是历史的创造者（物质财富、精神财富的创造者，社会变革的决定力量）——坚持群众观点和群众路线（一切为了群众、一切依靠群众，从群众中来、到群众中去）。价值观的导向作用；在劳动和奉献、个人与社会的统一中创造和实现人生价值。
def_en: The social half of the doctrine: being determines consciousness; productive forces and relations, base and superstructure, drive history through their friction (reform, in this frame, is socialism 'perfecting itself' when relations lag forces); and the masses — not heroes — make history, grounding the 'mass line' method ('from the masses, to the masses') that the party names as its lifeline. This is the theory referenced by every 'people-centred' formulation, and the analytical frame [[marxism]] built and this book operationalises for civic instruction.

sources.chapter: 第五课 寻觅社会的真谛

collocations: productive forces and relations of production
example: 'Base and superstructure' escaped the seminar long ago — Economist writers use it half-ironically for everything from crypto to culture wars; the source vocabulary is this chapter's.
nuance: 经济基础/上层建筑 = base/superstructure（英语理论界通用）；群众路线 = the mass line（官方译，治理研究专名）。“自我完善和发展”是改革的经典正当化语式——链 [[economic-reform]]、[[third-plenum]]。人民群众史观 vs 英雄史观（great man theory）为史学理论对轴——链 [[shiji]]。
